name: Dialog
description: A modal overlay that requires user interaction before the rest of the UI becomes accessible

anatomy.backdrop: The semi-transparent overlay behind the dialog
anatomy.header: The title bar area containing the dialog title and close button
anatomy.title: The dialog’s heading (referenced by aria-labelledby)
anatomy.closeButton: The X button to dismiss the dialog

open.description: Dialog is visible and focus is trapped within

focused.description: A focusable element within the dialog has focus

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to the next focusable element within the dialog
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Move focus to the previous focusable element within the dialog
keyboard.Escape: Closes the dialog and returns focus to the trigger element

variants.drawer: Panel that slides in from an edge (still a modal dialog)
variants.alert: Alert dialog requiring an explicit user decision (role=alertdialog)

title.description: Dialog heading — referenced by aria-labelledby; always required

body.description: Main content area — accepts any structured content

footer.description: Action buttons — max two actions (primary + cancel); omit for informational dialogs

closeButton.description: Icon button in the header to dismiss — omit for critical/blocking dialogs
